LIST.LOADING_SUBTITLE: Please wait while we fetch your rooms...
LIST.SUBTITLE_MEMBER: Browse and access the rooms available to you.
LIST.SUBTITLE_MANAGER: Manage your rooms, create new ones, or access the rooms available to you.
LIST.EMPTY_MEMBER: You are not a member of any room yet. Contact a room manager or administrator to gain access to a room.
LIST.EMPTY_ADMIN: There are no rooms in OpenVidu Meet yet. Create the first room to start hosting meetings and manage your video conferences.
LIST.EMPTY_MANAGER: You don't have access to any room yet. Create your first room to start hosting meetings and manage your video conferences.
LIST.FILTER_BY_STATUS_DESC: Narrows the result to rooms with the selected status.
LIST.INCLUDE_BY_USER_OR_ACCESS: Include rooms by user or access
LIST.INCLUDE_BY_USER_OR_ACCESS_DESC: Leave empty to include all rooms. Set any field below to limit the result to the union of the selected criteria.
LIST.INCLUDE_ROOMS_DESC: Leave empty to show all accessible rooms. Select any to limit the result to the union of the selected groups.
LIST.NO_MATCH_TITLE: No rooms match your search criteria and/or filters
LIST.NO_MATCH_DESC: Try adjusting or clearing your filters to see more rooms.

DETAIL.LOADING_SUBTITLE: Please wait while we fetch the room information...
DETAIL.NO_RECORDINGS_ACCESS_DESC: You don't have permission to view recordings for this room.

BASIC_CREATION.TITLE: Create Room
BASIC_CREATION.DESCRIPTION: Create a new room by just providing a name. For advanced options, use the room wizard.
BASIC_CREATION.ROOM_NAME_HINT: Enter a custom room name, or leave blank to use the default name "Room".
BASIC_CREATION.ADVANCED_TOOLTIP: Open room wizard for advanced configuration

SHARE_DIALOG.TITLE: Share Room Access Links
SHARE_DIALOG.USERS_ENABLED_DESC: Any user can access the room. Non-members will get Speaker permissions.
SHARE_DIALOG.USER_MEMBERS_DESC_MANAGE_PREFIX: Only for users that are members.
SHARE_DIALOG.USER_MEMBERS_DESC_MANAGE_SUFFIX: to enable it for all users.
SHARE_DIALOG.USER_MEMBERS_DESC_NO_MANAGE: For users that are members only. Ask a room manager to enable it for all users.
SHARE_DIALOG.ANONYMOUS_SPEAKER_ENABLED_DESC: Any guest with the link will access the room with Speaker permissions
SHARE_DIALOG.DISABLED_NO_MANAGE: Disabled. Ask a room manager to enable it.
SHARE_DIALOG.ANONYMOUS_MODERATOR_ENABLED_DESC: Any guest with the link will access the room with Moderator permissions
SHARE_DIALOG.GUEST_INFO_MIDDLE: , copy their personal link from the
SHARE_DIALOG.GUEST_INFO_SUFFIX: tab in the room details page.

DELETE_DIALOG.CHOOSE_HANDLING: Please choose how to handle room deletion errors:
DELETE_DIALOG.MEETING_FORCE_DESC: The meeting will be ended immediately, and the room will be deleted without waiting for participants to leave.
DELETE_DIALOG.MEETING_WHEN_ENDS_DESC: The room will be deleted when the meeting ends.
DELETE_DIALOG.MEETING_FAIL_DESC: The deletion will fail if there is an active meeting.
DELETE_DIALOG.RECORDINGS_FORCE_DESC: The room and its recordings will be deleted immediately.
DELETE_DIALOG.RECORDINGS_CLOSE_DESC: The room will be closed instead of deleted, maintaining its recordings.
DELETE_DIALOG.RECORDINGS_FAIL_DESC: The deletion will fail if the room has recordings.

WIZARD.CANCEL_ARIA: Cancel wizard and return to previous page
WIZARD.SUBTITLE_CREATE: Create and configure your video room in a few simple steps
WIZARD.UPDATING_SUBTITLE: Please wait while we update your room settings...
WIZARD.CREATING_SUBTITLE: Please wait while we set up your video room...

DETAILS.TITLE: Room Details
DETAILS.DESCRIPTION: Configure your room's details including name and automatic deletion date
DETAILS.ROOM_NAME_HINT: Enter a custom room name, or leave blank to use the default name "Room".
DETAILS.AUTO_DELETION_DATE_HINT: Optional. Room will be automatically deleted on this date and time.
DETAILS.MIN_FUTURE_DATETIME_ERROR: Deletion date and time must be at least one hour in the future
DETAILS.AUTO_DELETION_POLICIES_DESC: Configure how the room should be handled during auto-deletion if there are active meetings or recordings.
DETAILS.MEETING_FORCE_DESC: The meeting will be ended, and the room will be deleted without waiting for participants to leave.
DETAILS.MEETING_WHEN_ENDS_DESC: The room will be deleted when the meeting ends.
DETAILS.RECORDINGS_FORCE_DESC: The room and its recordings will be deleted.
DETAILS.RECORDINGS_CLOSE_DESC: The room will be closed instead of deleted, maintaining its recordings.

ACCESS.TITLE: Room Access
ACCESS.DESCRIPTION: Define who can access this room and what permissions they have.
ACCESS.ACCESS_POLICY_SUBTITLE: Members can always access this room. The options below let you grant additional access to non-members.
ACCESS.ANONYMOUS_MODERATOR_DESC: Allow anonymous guests to access the room with Moderator permissions
ACCESS.ANONYMOUS_SPEAKER_DESC: Allow anonymous guests to access the room with Speaker permissions
ACCESS.ALL_USERS_DESC: Allow any user to access the room. Non-members will get Speaker permissions
ACCESS.MODERATOR_PANEL_DESC: Configure what moderators can do in this room
ACCESS.SPEAKER: Speaker
ACCESS.SPEAKER_PANEL_DESC: Configure what speakers can do in this room
ACCESS.MEMBERS_SUBTITLE: Add specific members to this room and assign them custom permissions.

FEATURES.TITLE: Room Features
FEATURES.DESCRIPTION: Configure additional features and functionality for your room
FEATURES.E2EE_DESC: Add an extra layer of security to your meetings. No one outside the meeting, not even anyone with server access, can see or hear the conversation.
FEATURES.E2EE_RESTRICTION_ALL_PARTICIPANTS: All participants must use the same encryption key to see and hear each other.
FEATURES.E2EE_RESTRICTION_INCORRECT_KEY: Participants who enter an incorrect key will not receive an error message but will be unable to see or hear others.
FEATURES.CAPTIONS_DESC: Enable live transcription to display captions during the meeting
FEATURES.CHAT_DESC: Allow participants to send messages during the meeting
FEATURES.VIRTUAL_BACKGROUNDS_DESC: Enable virtual backgrounds and blur effects for participants

RECORDING_CONFIG.TITLE: Recording Configuration
RECORDING_CONFIG.DESCRIPTION: Choose whether to enable recording capabilities for this room
RECORDING_CONFIG.E2EE_WARNING_SUFFIX: while end-to-end encryption is enabled. If you allow recording, encryption will be automatically disabled for this room.
RECORDING_CONFIG.ALLOW_RECORDING_DESC: Enable recording features for this room, allowing authorized participants to start and manage recordings.
RECORDING_CONFIG.NO_RECORDING_DESC: Room will not be recorded. Participants can join without recording concerns.
RECORDING_CONFIG.ANONYMOUS_ACCESS_DESC: Allow anyone with the link to access individual recordings without logging in

RECORDING_LAYOUT.TITLE: Recording Layout
RECORDING_LAYOUT.DESCRIPTION: Choose how participants will be arranged in the recording
RECORDING_LAYOUT.GRID_DESC: Display participants in an equal-size grid
RECORDING_LAYOUT.SPEAKER_DESC: Highlight the active speaker with other participants below
RECORDING_LAYOUT.SINGLE_SPEAKER_DESC: Show only the active speaker in the recording

RECORDING_TRIGGER.TITLE: Recording Trigger
RECORDING_TRIGGER.DESCRIPTION: Choose when recording should start automatically

ERRORS.ROOM_SCHEDULED_CLOSE: Room scheduled to be closed when the meeting ends
ERRORS.ROOM_CREATED_MEMBERS_FAILED_PREFIX: Room created, but failed to add

STATUS_TOOLTIP.OPEN: Room is open and available for members to start a meeting
STATUS_TOOLTIP.ACTIVE_MEETING: A meeting is currently ongoing in this room
STATUS_TOOLTIP.CLOSED: Room is closed and not available for members to start a meeting

MEETING_END_TOOLTIP.CLOSE: The room will be closed when the meeting ends
MEETING_END_TOOLTIP.DELETE: The room and its recordings will be deleted when the meeting ends

AUTO_DELETION_TOOLTIP.NONE: No auto-deletion. Room remains until manually deleted
AUTO_DELETION_TOOLTIP.EXPIRED: Auto-deletion date has passed but room was not deleted due to auto-deletion policy

TOGGLE.OPEN_TOOLTIP: Open room to allow members to start a meeting

ACCESS_TOOLTIP.CLOSED: Room is closed. Reopen the room to allow members to access it

SHARE_TOOLTIP.CLOSED: Room is closed. Reopen the room to allow sharing access links

EDIT_TOOLTIP.ACTIVE: Editing the room is disabled during an active meeting
